coreResponsibility.purpose: Media Source Adapter (middleware layer) that integrates the HLS.js library with the PlayKit JS Player to enable HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) playback via Media Source Extensions (MSE).

featureOwnership: HLS manifest parsing and loading (m3u8 files)
Adaptive Bitrate (ABR) streaming and quality switching
Text track (subtitle/caption) management including CEA-608/708 captions
Media error recovery mechanisms (decoding errors, codec swaps)
Live streaming DVR window management and live edge calculation
Network request/response filtering and custom loaders
External stream redirection via JSONP fallback
Timed metadata (ID3 tags) extraction and dispatch
FPS drop detection and ABR restrictions
dataHandling: HLS manifest data (master and media playlists)
Playback state synchronization between HLS.js and video element
Stream start time and DVR window boundaries
Error recovery state (timestamps for decoding/codec swap attempts)

upstream: HLS.js library (v1.2.0+) - Third-party HLS streaming engine
PlayKit JS Core (@playkit-js/playkit-js) - Base player framework providing BaseMediaSourceAdapter, Track classes, Event system, and utility functions
HLS manifests (m3u8 files) from CDN/streaming servers
DRM key servers (passed through, not directly handled)
downstream: PlayKit JS Player (consumes this adapter via registerMediaSourceAdapter)
PlayKit JS UI components (receives track metadata, events)
PlayKit JS Plugins (analytics, ads, etc. consume events)
externalAPIs: HLS.js JavaScript library API (events, configuration, methods)
JSONP protocol for external stream redirection

entryPoints: src/index.ts - Main module entry point and adapter registration
src/hls-adapter.ts - Core HLS adapter class (1396 lines, primary logic)
src/loader.ts - Custom XMLHttpRequest loader with context passing
src/jsonp-ploader.ts - JSONP playlist loader for external stream redirection
src/errors.ts - HLS.js error mapping to PlayKit error system
